data.title: dotfiles: deploy byobu config
data.description:
Sub-issue of #12

Add ansible tasks to deploy byobu terminal multiplexer config.

**Files:** `roles/03-dotfiles/files/.config/byobu/`

* backend, prompt, windows, profile.tmux, keybindings, keybindings.tmux
* statusrc, color.tmux, status, datetime.tmux, windows.tmux, color, profile
* [byobu.md](<http://byobu.md>)

**Tasks:**

- [ ] Ensure byobu config directory exists
- [ ] Symlink byobu config files
- [ ] Test deployment with `./run.sh`
